search.title: Search Flights
search.lead: Passport details are not required for search. They are requested only during booking.
search.validationRequired: Departure and arrival fields are required.
search.validationLatin: Use only Latin characters in departure/arrival fields.

home.title: Manage your journey with confidence
home.lead: Safar24 is built to provide a user-friendly, clear, and organized flight ticket service. Our goal is to simplify travel in one place: from search to booking, communication, and support.
home.cardLead: A premium airline booking interface optimized for simplicity, clarity, and speed.
home.featureSearchBody: We find the best matching flight options by route, date, and price.
home.featureBookingBody: After pressing book, user cabinet, passport data, and payment flow continue seamlessly.
home.featureSupportBody: Each step is presented clearly, communication channels stay open, and ticket details are delivered in an organized way.
home.noFlights: No flights are available at the moment.

register.title: Create account
register.lead: A 6-digit verification code will be sent to your email. Your account is not activated until the code is entered.
register.verifyLead: The code was sent to {{email}}. You can also re-enter your data.

resend.statusWait: Didn't receive the code? Resend opens in {{seconds}} seconds.
resend.statusReady: Didn't receive the code? You can resend the code.
resend.statusExpired: Didn't receive code? Check your spam/block list.

profile.title: Profile information
profile.lead: Personal details must be accurate for booking and ticketing. Dates are displayed in DD.MM.YYYY format.
profile.importantDetails: The phone, passport, birth date, gender, and Gmail on this page are used for ticket creation and delivery.
profile.infoLead: These details are required by the airline and reservation flow. They appear on the ticket and PDF boarding pass.
profile.infoRequired: Required: phone, passport number, passport series, date of birth, gender, citizenship, passport issue/expiry dates, and Gmail.
profile.infoIssueDate: Passport issue date: must be within the last 10 years.
profile.infoExpiryDate: Passport expiry date: must be after issue date and no more than 20 years from issue date.
profile.infoTravelRequirement: Travel requirement: passport must remain valid for at least 6 months at travel time.
profile.infoGmailNote: Gmail: ticket PDF and web ticket link are sent to this exact email.

payment.title: Submit payment
payment.lead: Review booking details and submit payment.

validation.passportNumberInvalid: Passport number must contain 7-15 A-Z/0-9 characters.
validation.passportSeriesInvalid: Passport series must contain 2 Latin letters (AA).
validation.gmailRequired: Please enter Gmail for ticket delivery (example@gmail.com).
validation.birthFuture: Birth date cannot be in the future.
validation.issueFuture: Passport issue date cannot be after today.
validation.issueTooOld: Passport issue date must be within the last 10 years.
validation.expAfterIssue: Passport expiry date must be after issue date.
validation.expTooLong: Passport validity must not exceed 20 years from issue date.
validation.expMinValidity: Passport must remain valid for at least 6 months.
validation.groupGmailRequired: Please enter Gmail for ticket delivery.

flash.otpWait: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds before resending the code.
flash.passwordMin: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.

Verification code has been sent to your email. Enter the code.
flashMap.Tasdiqlash kodi muddati tugadi. Yangi ko: Verification code expired. Request a new code.
flashMap.Ro'yxatdan o'tish muvaffaqiyatli. Endi l: Registration completed successfully. Please log in.
flashMap.Juda ko'p urinish bo'ldi. 15 daqiqadan k: Too many attempts. Try again after 15 minutes.
flashMap.Qayerdan va Qayerga maydonlarini to'ldir: Fill in both departure and arrival fields.
flashMap.Qayerdan/Qayerga maydonlarida faqat loti: Use only Latin characters in departure/arrival fields.
